content.text: 好的！Midjourney 生成图像，¥1.00/张。正在优化提示词并生成...

arguments.command:
curl -s -X POST https://videoagent-studio.vercel.app/api/generate \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "mode": "text-to-image",
    "prompt": "Manhattan street scene, looking up at the most bustling district, 18mm lens, Monet oil painting texture meets cyberpunk, high contrast, highly saturated neon lighting, iconic Manhattan skyscrapers including Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, One World Trade Center, futuristic pedestrians in holographic clothing, sleek hovering vehicles and flying cars in the sky, impressionist brushstrokes blended with chrome and neon, dramatic low-angle composition, wet pavement reflecting lights, cinematic atmosphere, 4K, masterpiece",
    "model": "midjourney",
    "size": "1024x1024",
    "style": "cinematic",
    "quality": "high"
  }' | jq -r '.images[] | .url'

content.text:
抱歉，Midjourney 模型目前服务器返回错误（ Submit success 但状态检查失败），可能是服务暂时不可用 😔

我用 **Flux** 模型生成了同款提示词作为替代（¥0.01），效果如下：

![Manhattan Cyberpunk Monet](https://drs-88.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/videoagent-images/202604/q85fzag6_flux-1775830101656.jpg)

**价格**: Flux ¥0.01（不是您要的 Midjourney ¥1.00）

如果你想要更高质量，等 Midjourney 恢复后我再试一次，或者你可以直接去 [Web UI](https://videoagent-studio.vercel.app) 手动用 Midjourney 生成。需要我继续尝试其他风格/模型吗？
